title: Subscription access denials caused by stale reads from lagging replica
summary: Customers intermittently lost access to newly purchased premium features. The application logs mostly showed not-found responses and occasional query timeouts, but the real RCA depends on connecting a read-routing deployment with write-heavy billing backfill activity that pushed replica lag high enough to serve stale subscription state.
operational_context: A scheduled invoice reconciliation backfill started at 01:55Z and increased write volume on the billing primary.
The entitlements API deployment at 02:03Z expanded replica-preferring reads for cache misses.
